issues.description: Missing condition for card type filter ('CP'). Effect should check trash has at least 3 cards with type including 'CP' before allowing the action.
Missing cost requirement. Effect requires placing 3 'CP' cards from trash at bottom of deck as a cost condition before KO action can occur. This is a conditional cost, not just a target filter.
Action should be conditional/optional ('may'). KO should only trigger if player chooses to and successfully pays the cost of placing 3 CP cards from trash.
